metadata.description: Utah 2026 provisional spike-only elk hunt opportunities dataset based on the 2025 field regulations guidebook.

records.title: General-season spike bull elk - archery
records.seasonLabel: Aug. 16-Sept. 5 (Paunsaugunt closed to general archery; Book Cliffs spike bull only)
records.sourceGuide: 2025 Utah Big Game Field Regulations Guidebook (used provisionally for 2026 until updated field regs are published)

records.title: Multiseason general spike bull elk
records.seasonLabel: Archery Aug. 16-Sept. 5; Any legal weapon Oct. 4-Oct. 16; Muzzleloader Oct. 29-Nov. 6

records.title: General-season youth elk - spike units
